com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXBaseContext

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXLanguageProvider, IXPrintServiceProvider, IXSymbolLibraryProvider
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXApplicationContext, IXSubAssemblyWorkbookContext, IXSystemContext

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXBaseContext
extends IXLanguageProvider, IXPrintServiceProvider, IXSymbolLibraryProvider
    Provides data access to the object in the system for plugin use

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXOptionExpressionParser createOptionExpressionParser()
      This creates an option expression parser object and returns it.
      IXOptionExpressionValidator createOptionExpressionValidator()
      This create an option expression validator object and returns it.
      IXDesignComparisonContext getDesignComparisonContext()
      This method will provide the access to the context that will allow the user to complete design comparison.
      IXLibrary getLibrary()
      This method returns an IXLibrary object.
      IXHelper getXHelper()
      Returns the helper class.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXLanguageProvider

        getLanguageManager

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPrintServiceProvider

        getPrintServices

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXSymbolLibraryProvider

        getSymbolLibraries

    • Method Detail

      • getLibrary

        IXLibrary getLibrary()
        This method returns an IXLibrary object. This can be used to search for library parts.
        Returns:
        the library object, will return 'null' if no library present.

      • createOptionExpressionValidator

        IXOptionExpressionValidator createOptionExpressionValidator()

        This create an option expression validator object and returns it. This option expression validator can be used to validation on option expression and to check if option expression is applicable for certian set of options.

        Returns:
        the OptionExpressionValidator object.

      • createOptionExpressionParser

        IXOptionExpressionParser createOptionExpressionParser()
        This creates an option expression parser object and returns it. Option expression parser can be used to parse an option expression string and obtain options used in the expression
        Returns:
        the OptionExpressionParser object.

      • getDesignComparisonContext

        IXDesignComparisonContext getDesignComparisonContext()
        This method will provide the access to the context that will allow the user to complete design comparison. The user of design comparison will invoke this method which returns the handle upon which the design comparison can be built.
        Returns:
        context of the Design Comparison.

      • getXHelper

        IXHelper getXHelper()
        Returns the helper class.
        Returns:
        helper.
